resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def bitwiseComplement(self, n: int) -> int:
        if n == 0:
            return 1
        mask = (1 << (n.bit_length())) - 1
        return n ^ mask
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Compute a bitmask of 1s with the same bit-length as n, then XOR n with this mask to flip every bit. Handles the edge case n=0 separately.
